name: Aela Table Lamp - 22 Inch Height - TBL2000 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the AELA 22 inch black ceramic table lamp. This elegant piece brings a touch of modern sophistication to any room. Crafted from ceramic, its sleek black finish complements a variety of decor styles perfectly. The subtle design pairs beautifully with both contemporary and classic interiors, making it a versatile addition to your home. The 22 inch stature ensures it stands out on any table or sideboard, providing both function and style. Whether placed in a living room, bedroom, or study, this lamp offers a warm and inviting glow. Enhance your home's ambience with the understated charm of this stylish lamp. Transform any space into a welcoming retreat with its beautiful presence.
